'''''Century 2''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was part of a convoy en route an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base under construction in the [[Ghorman system/Legends|Ghorman system]] carrying [[Power generator/Legends|power generators]]. However, the freighter, along with ''[[Century 1]]'' and ''[[Century 3]]'', was [[Raid above Ghorman|destroyed]] by a Rebel [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]] and a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]] despite the protection of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]]. This resulted in a delay of the construction of the base for a full [[Standard year/Legends|year]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
